description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular receiver with a prominent detachable box magazine and a straight-line stock. The barrel is long and cylindrical, fitted with a large suppressor at the muzzle, giving it a tactical appearance. The handguard is ribbed for grip, extending nearly the full length of the barrel, and the pistol grip is sharply angled for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights mounted on top of the receiver. The overall finish is matte black, suggesting a utilitarian, stealth-oriented design. The construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a long suppressor, ribbed handguard, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: A left-side view reveals the full length of the suppressor, ribbed handguard, detachable box magazine, and the angular stock.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
description_view_3: The right-side view displays the magazine, trigger area, and the full length of the suppressor and handguard.
